title: CLEAN LIKE NEW 2024 MOOMBA MAX
description: MOOMBA MAX CLEAN LIKE NEW MAX WITH 217 HRS $91,999 OBO The 2025 Moomba Max brings modern wake performance and family-focused design together in one bold 22-foot package. Built for riders who want space, power, and waves that can be fine-tuned to any style, the Max delivers an experience that feels confident and natural from the first throttle forward. Its wide 8.5-foot beam creates an open layout that keeps sixteen friends comfortable and ready for action, whether you’re setting up for a wakesurf session or enjoying an evening cruise on Lake Norman. From bow to transom, every inch of this boat is designed to make time on the water easier, more enjoyable, and undeniably fun. Under the engine hatch, Moomba’s trusted power partnership with Indmar continues to impress. The Raptor 400 6.2L V-drive pushes out 365 horsepower, designed not just for speed, but for the low-end torque wakeboarding demands. The engine’s smooth, responsive setup pairs perfectly with Moomba’s integrated surf systems, allowing riders to customize wave size and shape with precision. Whether you’re an experienced rider fine-tuning a wave face or setting up a gentle push for new surfers, the Max’s performance shines across all skill levels. Onboard, thoughtful details make it clear Moomba prioritized comfort and function. The spacious cockpit layout features deep seating, intuitive storage, and durable materials that stand up to full summer seasons. The helm feels intuitive, boasting clean instrumentation and easy access to surf presets and ballast management. Sound plays a huge role in setting the vibe, and with options for advanced audio upgrades, every playlist hits perfectly. Pull up to the cove, drop anchor, and the party transitions effortlessly from wake sessions to laid-back lounging. As one of SouthTown Watersports' flagship models in Charlotte, North Carolina, the 2025 Moomba Max blends local expertise with factory-tuned performance. Charlotte riders know these boats perform beautifully on area lakes, and the Max continues that tradition. Big in personality, serious in performance, and built with Moomba’s passion for summer fun, this boat makes every set on the water count.
